name: security-compliance
description: Security and compliance operations. Bundles Vanta (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA GRC), KnowBe4 (security awareness), ThreatLocker (zero-trust endpoint), Blumira (SIEM and detection), and Proofpoint plus Checkpoint Avanan (email security), alongside core audit-readiness, evidence-gap, risk-heatmap, and approval-triage skills.
